zh.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet是John de Corbet VI的女兒，於大約1462年出生在英國史洛普爾隆諾。她於大約1488年與John De Botterell在英國英格蘭史洛普爾隆諾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年4月7日在英國史洛普爾布福德享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet是John de Corbet VI的女儿，于大约1462年出生在英国史洛普爾隆諾。她于大约1488年与John De Botterell在英国英格兰史洛普爾隆諾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年4月7日在英国史洛普爾布福德享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet was born about 1462, in Longnor, Shropshire, England as the daughter of John de Corbet VI. She married John De Botterell about 1488, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 7 April 1547, in Burford, Shropshire, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet est née environ 1462, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, fille de John de Corbet VI. Elle a épousé John De Botterell environ 1488, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 avril 1547, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Corbetは約1462年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーでJohn de Corbet VIの娘として生まれた。約1488年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーでJohn De Botterellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年4月7日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet(은)는 대략 1462년 영국 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 John de Corbet VI의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 John De Botterell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 4월 7일 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet nasceu aproximadamente 1462, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra filha de John de Corbet VI. Ela casou-se com John De Botterell aproximadamente 1488, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de abril de 1547, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Corbet родилась около 1462 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия. Её отца звали John de Corbet VI. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Botterell около 1488 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 апреля 1547 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.
